title: I Believed in You
writer: William M. Conselman, William Anthony McGuire
actors: Rosemary Ames, John Boles, Victor Jory
plot: After miners attack Jim Crowl, a labor agitator trying to incite them to strike, he seeks refuge from the police at the home of True Merrill, a naive would-be writer who has lived all her life with her recently deceased father. Ji...
